force.name: Northumbria Police
force.pledge:
The police service in England and Wales will support law abiding citizens and pursue criminals relentlessly to keep you and your neighbourhoods safe from harm.

We will:

Treat you fairly, with respect and provide accessible services when you need them.


Tell you who your Neighbourhood Policing Team is and how you can contact them.


Ensure police patrols in your area are where and when you say you need them most.


Respond promptly to all messages to your Neighbourhood Policing Team.


Attend emergencies immediately, giving an estimated arrival time.


Answer non-emergency calls promptly and provide a policing response to meet your needs.


Arrange regular public meetings with your Neighbourhood Policing Team to discuss those things important to you.


Provide monthly updates about what we are doing with our partners to make your neighbourhood safer.


Agree with victims how often we will update you about your case and for how long.


Respond promptly to any report of poor service and agree how it will be handled.


We want to do our best for you. If we fail to meet our Policing Pledge we will always explain why we have not met the high standards we aim for and you deserve.

team.name: Sunderland Central
team.description: Sunderland has extensive, well-established residential communities and business districts, including the Nissan complex. We have police bases in Washington, Southwick, the city centre, Farringdon and Houghton-le-Spring. The Area Command is also home to our Mounted Unit.

location.address: Sunderland Central Police Office Sunderland Community Fire Station Railway Row Sunderland SR1 3HE

team.name: Sunderland East
team.description: Sunderland has extensive, well-established residential communities and business districts, including the Nissan complex. We have police bases in Washington, Southwick, the city centre, Farringdon and Houghton-le-Spring. The Area Command is also home to our Mounted Unit.

location.address: Sunderland East Police Office The Old Orphanage Moor Terrace Hendon Sunderlan SR1 2JH

team.name: Farringdon, Pennywell, Pallion, Silksworth and Ryhope (Sunderland West)
team.description: West Sunderland includes the areas of Farringdon, Silksworth, Grindon, Pennywell and Thorney Close.

location.address: Farringdon Hall Police Station Primate Road Sunderland SR3 1TQ

team.name: Carley Hill, Hylton Red House, Witherwack, Fulwell and Roker (Sunderland North)
team.description: Sunderland has extensive, well-established residential communities and business districts, including the Nissan complex. We have police bases in Washington, Southwick, the city centre, Farringdon and Houghton-le-Spring. The Area Command is also home to our Mounted Unit.

location.address: Southwick Police Station Church Bank Southwick Sunderland SR5 2DU

team.name: Washington
team.description: Sunderland has extensive, well-established residential communities and business districts, including the Nissan complex. We have police bases in Washington, Southwick, the city centre, Farringdon and Houghton-le-Spring. The Area Command is also home to our Mounted Unit.

location.address: Washington Police Station The Galleries Washington NE38 7RY

team.name: Houghton
team.description: Sunderland has extensive, well-established residential communities and business districts, including the Nissan complex. We have police bases in Washington, Southwick, the city centre, Farringdon and Houghton-le-Spring. The Area Command is also home to our Mounted Unit.

location.address: Houghton-le-Spring Police Station Dairy Lane Houghton le Spring DH4 5BL

team.name: Riverside and West Shields
team.description: Home of the Great North Run, the largest town in the area is South Shields. South Tyneside's population is largely centred around the riverside towns of Jarrow and Hebburn. Our primary police base for the area is Millbank.

location.address: South Shields Police Station Millbank Station Road South Shields NE33 1RR

team.name: Boldon, Cleadon, Whitburn
team.description: Home of the Great North Run, the largest town in the area is South Shields. South Tyneside's population is largely centred around the riverside towns of Jarrow and Hebburn. Our primary police base for the area is Millbank.

location.address: South Shields Police Station Millbank Station Road South Shields NE33 1RR

team.name: Hebburn and Jarrow
team.description: Home of the Great North Run, the largest town in the area is South Shields. South Tyneside's population is largely centred around the riverside towns of Jarrow and Hebburn. Our primary police base for the area is Millbank.

location.address: Hebburn Police Station Victoria Road East Hebburn NE31 1YG

team.name: Gateshead Central
team.description: As well as policing more urban areas in the town centre and its nearby suburbs, we also police more rural areas of country parkland and woodland to the west of Gateshead. Our police bases in Gateshead are located in Whickham, in the town centre and in the Metro Centre shopping complex.

location.address: Gateshead Police Station High West Street Gateshead NE8 1BN

team.name: Leam Lane, Wardley, Heworth, Felling and Bill Quay (Gateshead East)
team.description: As well as policing more urban areas in the town centre and its nearby suburbs, we also police more rural areas of country parkland and woodland to the west of Gateshead. Our police bases in Gateshead are located in Whickham, in the town centre and in the Metro Centre shopping complex.

location.address: Gateshead Police Station High West Street Gateshead NE8 1BN

team.name: Low Fell and Allerdene
team.description: As well as policing more urban areas in the town centre and its nearby suburbs, we also police more rural areas of country parkland and woodland to the west of Gateshead. Our police bases in Gateshead are located in Whickham, in the town centre and in the Metro Centre shopping complex.

location.address: Gateshead Police Station High West Street Gateshead NE8 1BN

team.name: Dunston, Teams, Whickham, Swalwell and Lobley Hill (Gateshead Inner West)
team.description: As well as policing more urban areas in the town centre and its nearby suburbs, we also police more rural areas of country parkland and woodland to the west of Gateshead. Our police bases in Gateshead are located in Whickham, in the town centre and in the Metro Centre shopping complex.

location.address: Whickham Police Station Front Street Whickham NE16 4HE

team.name: Blaydon, Winlaton, Ryton, Rowlands Gill and Chopwell (Gateshead Outer West)
team.description: As well as policing more urban areas in the town centre and its nearby suburbs, we also police more rural areas of country parkland and woodland to the west of Gateshead. Our police bases in Gateshead are located in Whickham, in the town centre and in the Metro Centre shopping complex.

location.address: Whickham Police Station Front Street Whickham NE16 4HE

team.name: North Shields
team.description: North Tyneside is a mix of urban areas combined with award-winning coastline. North Tyneside is the location of our force headquarters in Middle Engine Lane, Wallsend. There are also other police bases in North Shields and Whitley Bay

location.address: North Shields Police Station Upper Pearson Street North Shields NE30 1AB

team.name: Whitley Bay
team.description: North Tyneside is a mix of urban areas combined with award-winning coastline. North Tyneside is the location of our force headquarters in Middle Engine Lane, Wallsend. There are also other police bases in North Shields and Whitley Bay.

location.address: Whitley Bay Police Office Unit 21 Park View Shopping Centre Whitley Bay NE26 2TJ

team.name: Wallsend
team.description: North Tyneside is a mix of urban areas combined with award-winning coastline. North Tyneside is the location of our force headquarters in Middle Engine Lane, Wallsend. There are also other police bases in North Shields and Whitley Bay.

location.address: North Tyneside Area Command HQ Middle Engine Lane Wallsend Tyne and Wear NE28 9NT

team.name: Killingworth
team.description: North Tyneside is a mix of urban areas combined with award-winning coastline. North Tyneside is the location of our force headquarters in Middle Engine Lane, Wallsend. There are also other police bases in North Shields and Whitley Bay.

location.address: Killingworth Police Office White Swan Centre Citadel East Killingworth Newcastle upon Tyne NE12 6SS

team.name: Westerhope and Newburn
team.description: Newcastle is world-renowned for its nightlife, culture, heritage and sporting venues. Its suburbs are largely residential and Newcastle is also one of the most diverse areas in our force. We have police bases in the city centre, the West End, Byker and Etal Lane, plus a team stationed within the international airport.

location.address: Etal Lane Police Station Etal Lane Westerhope Newcastle NE5 4AW

team.name: Gosforth and Great Park
team.description: Newcastle is world-renowned for its nightlife, culture, heritage and sporting venues. Its suburbs are largely residential and Newcastle is also one of the most diverse areas in our force. We have police bases in the city centre, the West End, Byker and Etal Lane, plus a team stationed within the international airport.

location.address: Etal Lane Police Station Etal Lane Westerhope Newcastle

team.name: Bedlington
team.description: Northumberland is one of the largest counties to police in England and Wales in terms of square miles. Save for the south east corner it is a largely rural county. We have police bases in Berwick, Alnwick, Morpeth, Ashington, Bedlington, Blyth, Prudhoe and Hexham.

location.address: Bedlington Police Station Schalksmuhle Road Bedlington NE22 7LA

team.name: Ashington
team.description: Northumberland is one of the largest counties to police in England and Wales in terms of square miles. Save for the south east corner it is a largely rural county. We have police bases in Berwick, Alnwick, Morpeth, Ashington, Bedlington, Blyth, Prudhoe and Hexham.

location.address: Ashington Police Station Lintonville Terrace Ashington NE63 9JX

location.address: Blyth Police Station Bridge Street Blyth Northumberland NE24 3AA
